mapper.sql: id, user_id, order_no, amount, `status`, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: update p5w_order set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO p5w_order (user_id, order_no, amount, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
